title: Einstein Dataset
description: Represents a dataset used for training Einstein Vision or Language models, including labels, examples, and metadata.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the dataset was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the dataset was last updated.

totalExamples.description: Total number of examples in the dataset.

totalLabels.description: Total number of labels in the dataset.

available.description: Whether the dataset is available for training and predictions.

statusMsg.description: Status message describing the dataset's current state.

labelSummary.description: Summary of labels in the dataset.

Label.description: A label within a dataset used to classify examples.

datasetId.description: ID of the dataset this label belongs to.

numExamples.description: Number of examples with this label.
